current_phase: Milestone 9 — Orbikt v2 Repository Offline Foundation (obj-orbikt-v2-cloud-auth-shared-workspace)

objective.title: Orbikt v2 Cloud Auth and Shared Organization Workspace — Repository Offline Foundation
objective.boundaries: Repository-only foundation: migrations, RLS source/tests, Auth/client boundaries, undeployed Edge Function source, shared adapters, mobile navigation, and static/local verification. No Cloud link/push/deploy/Auth users/data import; no production alias fallback; no production-ready or v2.0.0 claim. Existing Workspace remains Case Workspace; tenant boundary uses tenant_workspace naming.

launcher: Official entry point: Orbikt.vbs -> launcher/server.mjs (localhost-only orchestrator :5199, zero-dep) + static app host for dist/ (:5198, SPA fallback). Pure decisions in launcher/launcherCore.mjs (20 tests). UI launcher/ui.html: 開始使用 Orbikt, status, data sources, diagnostics, update, stop — no developer terminology. Electron/Tauri-ready (docs/LAUNCHER.md).
milestone: M1–M5 COMPLETED (v1.1.0–v1.5.0). M6 file integrations partially completed at v1.6.0; remaining live external systems stay blocked. M7 Launcher COMPLETED at v1.7.0. M8 Team Calendar V1 COMPLETED at v1.7.1.
next_milestone: M9 Repository Offline Foundation IN PROGRESS: version-controlled Supabase/Auth/tenant/shared-calendar/mobile foundations. Cloud operations remain separately blocked.
team_calendar: v1.7.1 /calendar: responsive month/week/day views, filters, create/edit/complete/cancel, soft delete/restore, case/source links, team counts, LocalCalendarAdapter persistence, mock-role guards, Visit Manager read-only projections, Command Center summary. Browser-local only; NOT a shared multi-user backend; no Google two-way sync.
fa310_import: input/FA310/FA310.xls (390 records) -> fa310.generated.json: 375 matched to CS100, 15 unmatched (reported), manager via column S x input/manager-map/manager-map.csv (Big5). Browser contract: managerName/maskedManagerId/managerSource only. Hard raw-ID guard at import + tests + live scan.
manager_rule: FA310 PRIMARY responsible-manager source: 375/378 cases managerSource=fa310, 3 fallback. team.json names = roster full names (房立泓/江睿儀/簡淑儀/游靜怡/王郁琪). CS100 never primary while FA310 present.
security_note: mock-data/CS100.xlsx contained REAL PII and was untracked+gitignored at CP-0026; REMAINS IN GIT HISTORY — purge requires user-authorized history rewrite (see release-v1.6.0-review).
automation: automationRegistry.ts (9 entries: rule/source/surface/codePath/writes) rendered at Settings > 自動化透明度; refreshData() with done-mark merge + lastRefreshedAt; Command Center ↻ button. No automation writes to source systems.
case_workflow: Completion Checklist on Workspace Overview (6 derived items: open/assessment/AA01/FA310/dispatch/visit, explainable details, tab links, progress bar) + banner 完成度 x/6. src/modules/workspace/caseChecklist.ts reads stored statuses only (SSOT respected).
morning_workflow: Command Center: compact one-screen (v1.0.3) + v1.3.0 Daily Progress bar (checkable Today Tasks via store toggleTaskDone) + KPI chip click-through to filtered Cases registry (?visit=, ?dispatch=attention via src/lib/caseFilters.ts, reuses dispatchAttention).
workspace: Case-file Workspace: banner + 8 tabs + knowledge refs (pre-existing); v1.2.0 added Next Action strip (derived, explainable, every tab) and case-specific Abnormal Items panel (Overview). src/modules/workspace/caseFocus.ts reuses deriveAbnormal (no duplicated logic).
data_center: Promoted /data-center page: Data Health Summary, Source Status (all 6 systems), Import Report, Import History, Import Log, Matching Result, Validation Result, Source Warnings. All derivations in src/modules/data/dataCenter.ts from generated artifacts only.
data_sources: src/modules/data/dataSources.ts expanded to 6 sources (CS100 ok / FA310 pending / AA01 seed / Knowledge ok / Dispatch seed / Visit seed); status+mode+errors+dependsOn; record counts read from generated meta so they cannot drift.
matching: FA310<->CS100 manager rule (docs/DATA_MATCHING.md + caseManagerMatch.ts); staged on CS100 while FA310 pending; raw ID import-time only, browser maskedNationalId only.
privacy: Data Center reads generated data only; live DOM scan confirms no raw national ID / phone; validationResults() provides in-app evidence.
dashboard: Compact one-screen Command Center (unchanged from v1.0.3): KPI strip + dense panels (Today Tasks forward-looking, 異常通知, Eisenhower Matrix, Dispatch, Schedule, Visit)
ui: Codex UI handoff component library; Blueprint IA/routing/DataAdapters preserved; Data Center added as a global destination (not a module-dashboard).
last_commit: 7dcfae1 is the verified v1.7.1 baseline; v2 work continues on feat/orbikt-v2-cloud-foundation.
next_task: Review and approve the v2 Repository Offline Foundation design, then create the first TDD implementation plan. Cloud link/push/deploy remains unauthorized.
governance_note: CP-0029 activates the v2 repository-only objective. OAES requirement/architecture are Known; implementation/verification remain Unknown until repository evidence exists. Cloud verification remains a separate Stop Condition.
stack: React 18 + TypeScript 5.6 + Vite 5 + TailwindCSS 3 + React Router 6 + Zustand 4
data_source: CS100 seed (sanitized, 378 cases) + derived tasks/notifications/timeline/schedule; knowledge index (21 topics)
planner: AA01 engine vendored; AA01 tab = engine-integrated DRAFT mode, full authoring UI remains external
review: FA310 via LongCare-QA-Engine adapter seam (Evidence-First); no FA310 rules in React; masked national ID for identity
knowledge: practical-topics index (21) + external full-platform link (not full embedded Hub); citations preserved
genogram: prototype placeholder tab with integration checklist, bound to Case ID
documents: OneDrive link-first categorized shortcuts + per-case attachments
archived: archive/finance-module/ — alternate module-dashboard prototype (Blueprint-conflicting), archived not deleted
governance: Governance V2 baseline tracked (WORKFLOW.md / ACCEPTANCE.md / GOVERNANCE_README.md).
